title: provision-request wire contract
description: Shape of the molecule-core -> control-plane POST /cp/workspaces/provision request wire contract descriptor. The instance enumerates every wire field, its scalar/shape kind, and whether the control-plane RECEIVER consumes it. Two struct-pin tests keep the channel honest: a PRODUCER PIN in molecule-core (cpProvisionRequest's json tags MUST equal `fields` keys exactly) and a CONSUMER-COMPLETENESS pin in molecule-controlplane (wsProvisionRequest MUST carry a json tag for every cp_consumes:true field). A cp_consumes:false field is a DECLARED-DEAD wire field (sent but ignored) and MUST carry a `note` justifying why. This is the JSON-Schema (draft 2020-12) IDL per RFC molecule-core#3285 §15; the instance is the canonical data the schema validates.

_doc.description: Free-form documentation block (array of prose lines). Not machine-validated.

endpoint.description: The control-plane endpoint this request shape targets. Pinned (const) -- the wire contract is endpoint-specific; retargeting it is a deliberate, reviewable edit.

fields.description: Every wire field of the provision request, keyed by its EXACT JSON tag. The producer-pin (core) and consumer-completeness (CP) tests assert their structs' json tags against these keys, so adding/removing a key forces a matching struct edit.

type.description: Scalar/shape kind of the wire field (Go-side: string, int, bool, a struct -> object, a map -> map).

cp_consumes.description: Whether the control-plane receiver (wsProvisionRequest) decodes this field. false => a DECLARED-DEAD wire field (sent by core, ignored by CP); a note MUST justify why.

note.description: Justification / context for the field. REQUIRED when cp_consumes is false (the declared-dead-channel rule); optional context otherwise.
